headline: Starbucks Balances Nashville Supply Chain Push With Sugar Backlash Questions
summary: Starbucks, NasdaqGS:SBUX, is opening a new supply chain focused corporate office in Nashville, offering some Seattle based staff relocation options and planning to add local roles. The company is also facing public criticism from a government health official over the sugar content of its drinks, just as it rolls out new seasonal beverages. For investors tracking Starbucks at a share price of $98.99, these developments touch both its operations and its brand. The new Nashville hub signals a...
